gedcomModal.title: what is a GEDCOM file?
gedcomModal.description: GEDCOM (Genealogical Data Communication) is a standard file format for exchanging genealogical data between different family tree software programs.
gedcomModal.fileFormat: GEDCOM files have a .ged extension and contain information about individuals, families, relationships, birth dates, death dates, and other genealogical data.
gedcomModal.howToCreate: how to create a GEDCOM file
gedcomModal.instructions: Most family tree software can export your data as a GEDCOM file:

programs.ancestry: Trees → Settings → Export tree → Download GEDCOM file
programs.myHeritage: Family Tree → Manage tree → Export to GEDCOM

gedcomModal.note: Once you have your GEDCOM file, simply upload it using the file selector above to visualize your family tree in 3D.
